# doc-image-audit-exclusions.txt
#
# Images referenced in docs/source/ that are intentionally hand-crafted and
# are NOT auto-generated by a doc_image/doc_animation scenario.
#
# Add one repo-relative path per line.  Lines starting with # and blank
# lines are ignored.  Run `make doc_audit` (or `pytest tests/test_doc_audit.py`)
# to verify that all doc images are either covered by a scenario or listed here.

# Brand / logo assets
docs/source/assets/images/mixed.png

# Concepts — DOM navigation diagrams (hand-drawn / manually exported)
docs/source/assets/page-assets/concepts/dom-1-light.png
docs/source/assets/page-assets/concepts/dom-1-dark.png
docs/source/assets/page-assets/concepts/dom-2.png

# Quick-start screenshots (manually taken)
docs/source/assets/page-assets/quick-start/quick-start-1-light.png
docs/source/assets/page-assets/quick-start/quick-start-1-dark.png

# Developers — manually captured card output screenshots
docs/source/assets/page-assets/developers/developers-1-light.png
docs/source/assets/page-assets/developers/developers-1-dark.png

# Forge — lock spark example animations (manually recorded)
